title: Use Two Pointers
tip: When searching for pairs in a sorted array, use two pointers starting from opposite ends to find the answer in O(N) time.

title: Index Your Queries
tip: Always index columns that are frequently used in WHERE clauses to drastically improve the speed of your database queries.

title: Master DFS
tip: Depth-First Search (DFS) is your best friend for navigating trees and graphs. Use recursion to keep the implementation clean and simple.
